00000006832045058623.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 22/Box (400845)

paragraph: Start the day off with a rush of energy with these Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods. The medium roast provides a balanced flavor that's smooth yet bold, while the individual pods let you make a single serving at a time. With 22 pods in each pack, this Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee is ideal for stocking up your home or workplace. The great tasting flavors and roasts from Dunkin'® are now available in convenient Keurig® K-Cup® pods. The same delicious coffee served in Dunkin'® restaurants is now available for your office with the same consistent taste and recipe used for over 60 years.
bullets: Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
headliner: Enjoy a rich, smooth beverage that helps wake you up with this 22-pack of Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original coffee pods.
expandedDescr: INTRODUCING RECYCLABLE* K-CUP PODS: Simple. Delicious. And now Recyclable. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done just peel, empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in all communities. Packaging may vary.
